elements.text: You are at your friend's house for dinner and their parents ask you about your parents. You're not sure how to answer because your parents are divorced, and you haven't seen your mother for a long time. You think about what you'll say, and feel...

elements.name: dinner_conversation--family_&_home_life--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
